summary: All 2 requested fixes verified working: 1) 'Contacter le vendeur' on homepage opens floating chat WITHOUT navigating away from the page 2) Promo prices display correctly in Dropshipper Dashboard (Catalogue, Modal) and Admin Dashboard (Products list) with crossed-out original prices, green promo prices, and discount badges
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.js correctly uses startConversation() from useChat instead of navigate() - chat opens floating without page change
DropshipperDashboard.js correctly shows promo prices in Catalogue with crossed-out original, green promo price, and discount badge
DropshipperDashboard.js customization modal shows 'Prix normal' (crossed out), 'Prix promo' (green), and discount percentage
AdminDashboard.js Products list shows promo prices with crossed-out original, green promo price, and discount badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: All fixes verified: 1) Contacter le vendeur opens floating chat without navigation 2) Promo prices display correctly in Dropshipper and Admin dashboards. Stripe payment is MOCKED.

Contacter le vendeur on homepage.details: Clicking button opens floating chat window showing vendor name, product context, and conversation area. URL stays on homepage (no navigation). Toast shows 'Conversation ouverte!'

Dropshipper Catalogue promo prices.details: Products show: crossed-out original price (gray), green promo price, discount badge (e.g., -55%, -70%, -60%)

Dropshipper customization modal promo pr.details: Modal shows: 'Prix normal: X FCFA' (crossed out), 'Prix promo: Y FCFA' (green), '-XX% de réduction' badge, margin calculated from promo price

Admin Products list promo prices.details: Products show: crossed-out original price, green promo price, discount badge (e.g., -55%, -70%, -60%)

screenshots_taken: homepage_initial.png - Homepage loaded with product cards
logged_in_hover.png - Product card hover showing 'Contacter le vendeur' button
after_contact_logged_in.png - Floating chat opened after clicking contact button (URL unchanged)
dropshipper_catalog.png - Dropshipper catalogue showing promo prices
dropshipper_modal_promo.png - Product customization modal with promo price display
admin_products.png - Admin products list showing promo prices
